allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; models=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('models',[]\); [print\(m['name'], m.get\('supportedGenerationMethods',''\)\) for m in models if 'generateContent' in m.get\('supportedGenerationMethods',[]\)]")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('@zxing/library'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(z\).filter\(k => k.includes\('Not'\) || k.includes\('Exception'\) || k.includes\('Controls'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { BrowserMultiFormatReader } = require\('@zxing/browser'\); const r = new BrowserMultiFormatReader\(\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\); const grandProto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(proto\); console.log\('own:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\)\); console.log\('parent:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(grandProto\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('_'\)\)\)")
